docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $241.00 FILED BY HORNE-WESLEY, CAROLYN AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, ARLEE J ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-23-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 SERVED MAY-06-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, ARLEE J

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM - PLAINTIFF CAROLYN HORNE-WESLEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARLEE J. MORGAN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY HORNE-WESLEY, CAROLYN MORGAN, ARLEE J
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HORNE-WESLEY, CAROLYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORGAN, ARLEE J $241.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $321.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
